name: ServiceNow Now Assist
arrSource: ServiceNow Q4 2025 earnings — $600M+ Now Assist ACV

arrClaimedVsReal.realNote: Cleanest reporter — AI is genuine premium SKU, but Pro Plus bundles non-AI features.

narrative.usage: Pro Plus premium est. 30-60% (UpperEdge). COGS test: inference cost est. $15-50M/yr = 92-97% "AI margin"
narrative.real: ~$400-500M (cleanest reporter — AI is a genuine premium SKU)
narrative.flags: Most honest of the group. But Pro Plus bundles non-AI features. Gross margin down 1.7pp (79.2->77.5%) — slight AI cost impact. Hidden consumption-based "assists" fees.
